description: Single source of truth for stacks, versions, and module identifiers exposed by the interactive installer (`scripts/install.sh`) and the `/dhpk:setup` slash command. Adding a new module means: (1) add an entry here, (2) create modules/<id>/module.yaml + skills/, (3) register the skills path in .claude-plugin/plugin.json.

stacks.name: PHP
stacks.description: PHP language baseline. The 5.6 module forbids 7.0+ syntax (typed params, ??, match, arrow fn, union types) and provides polyfill guidance.

stacks.name: Yii Framework
stacks.description: Yii PHP framework. The 1.1 module covers autoload, ActiveRecord / CDbCriteria, DDD layering, XSS/CSRF defaults.

stacks.name: PHPUnit
stacks.description: PHPUnit testing framework. The 5.7 module covers the assertion API and idiomatic test patterns for legacy PHP stacks.

hook_profiles.description: Default profile. Sentinel-driven review reminders fire on relevant edits.
Standard + extra warnings (missing tools at SessionStart, docker container mismatch, etc.).

docker.notes: Container names are passed positionally to `--plugin-option docker_containers=<csv>`. The first entry is exported as DHPK_PHP_CONTAINER, the second as DHPK_MYSQL_CONTAINER, etc. Empty list disables the SessionStart docker check entirely.
